wrapped.query: remember be like water when you dont know flow through what you know and look through all the different perspectives you have and your indivuality and responsability will always shine
wrapped.response: When faced with uncertainty, remember to be like water, flowing through what you know and looking through multiple perspectives to reveal the depth of your individuality and responsibility. This empathetic approach acknowledges that each person experiences the world uniquely, and by actively listening to and empathizing with diverse perspectives, you can cultivate deeper understanding and connection.
